candidate_row_template.next_phase_id: <candidate_next_gate, one of PURG_EXIT_READINESS_PACKET | INF_REVALIDATION_ROUTE_ADMISSION_PACKET | PURG_PROJECT_ARIS_GLOBAL_BASELINE_STABILIZATION_DECISION_PACKET, selected by operator_selected_branch>

notes: No operator_selected_branch was provided in this gate. The candidate_row cannot be populated without a selected branch, since next_phase_id/next_phase_class/minimum_deliverable depend on which of the three R1 branches (TRACK_EXIT_FIRST / TRACK_REVALIDATION_FIRST / TRACK_BASELINE_STABILIZATION_FIRST) the operator selects. This artifact records the template and activation requirements only; it does not change ROADMAP_CANONICAL.md or the live Transition Table.
